evals.prompt: I'm a military officer (8 years, Army logistics) transitioning to supply chain management in the private sector. I managed a $12M equipment portfolio and led 45-person teams in deployed environments. Help me translate my military experience into civilian business language for my resume and LinkedIn.
evals.expected_output: Translated resume content and LinkedIn framing that converts military experience into private-sector supply chain terminology
expectations: Output replaces military jargon with civilian equivalents (e.g., 'deployed environment' → 'high-pressure, time-sensitive operations')
Output frames leadership of 45-person teams in civilian management terms
Output translates $12M equipment portfolio into supply chain/operations language
Output identifies transferable skills relevant to supply chain management
Output provides 3-5 rewritten resume bullet points using civilian language

evals.prompt: I'm a high school math teacher (7 years) pivoting to data analytics and business intelligence roles. I have a master's in mathematics, built a school-wide assessment tracking system in Excel, and taught AP Statistics. Translate my teaching experience for data analyst job applications.
evals.expected_output: Reframed career narrative and resume content positioning teaching as relevant to data analytics roles
expectations: Output reframes teaching as communication, data interpretation, and stakeholder management skills
Output highlights the assessment tracking system as a data engineering/analytics project
Output positions AP Statistics teaching as domain expertise in statistics
Output provides rewritten resume bullets that would appeal to data/analytics hiring managers
Output suggests which data analyst job types best align with the teaching background
